title: Journalism Program Instructional Objectives
content:
Journalism Program Instructional Objectives

JOURNALISM- PROGRAM INSTRUCTIONAL OBJECTIVES

PIO1: Training professionals who can keep up with the digital transformation in the media and communication field.

PIO2: Training professionals who can create and manage digital content, and utilize the interactive and participatory features of new media.

PIO3: Training professionals who can effectively utilize the opportunities provided by new media in journalism.

PIO4: Training professionals with skills in new media literacy,

PIO5: Training professionals who adhere to professional ethical values,

PIO6: Training professionals who understand the role of new media and journalism in social development.
